name: recoil_app_exit_instance
description: RecoilApp::ExitInstance unregisters the window class when registered, saves and shuts down game options, tears down ZRDR/ZBD/localization/input state, delegates to the MFC app exit provider, and terminates the process.
known_limits: The functional target verifies the accepted direct shutdown dependencies and process-exit behavior that can be isolated in the native harness. A cold full ExitInstance call is not used as the primary smoke because the function intentionally terminates the process and its registered-window branch depends on MFC module/window-class provider state.
Binary-safe verification remains pending for the RecoilApp shutdown source cluster and MFC/Win32 provider call shape.
